title: SEC4: misleading 'hashing' language in pub_key_b64 doc comment
description: Line 105 in identity.rs says 'derive the PubId by hashing' but the actual implementation in verify_challenge() uses make_did_key() which is a multicodec format encoder, not a hash function. The comment should say 'encode' or 'format' instead of 'hash' to accurately reflect the code behavior.
